title: Breast Cancer Registry Data
description: Combined JSON Schema for all breast cancer extraction signatures.

procedure.description: identify which surgery procedure was used. e.g. partial mastectomy
procedure.title: Procedure

cancer_quadrant.description: identify the primary site of cancer. e.g. upper outer quadrant. please consider what side is the breast excision specimen when you determine the quadrant
cancer_quadrant.title: Cancer Quadrant

cancer_clock.description: identify the clock position of the cancer if mentioned. e.g. 3
cancer_clock.title: Cancer Clock

cancer_laterality.description: identify the side of the cancer. e.g. right
cancer_laterality.title: Cancer Laterality

histology.description: identify the histological type of the cancer. e.g. invasive carcinoma of no special type. If the histological type is not included in the above list, please code as other_special_types and specify the histological type in the description field.
histology.title: Histology

tumor_size.description: identify the size of the tumor in mm, rounded, if multiple tumors are present, please provide the size of the largest tumor
tumor_size.title: Tumor Size

lymphovascular_invasion.description: check whether or not lymphovascular invasion is present
lymphovascular_invasion.title: Lymphovascular Invasion

perineural_invasion.description: check whether or not perineural invasion is present
perineural_invasion.title: Perineural Invasion

distant_metastasis.description: check whether or not distant metastasis is present
distant_metastasis.title: Distant Metastasis

treatment_effect.description: check the treatment effect of the cancer. If you see "No known presurgical therapy", return None
treatment_effect.title: Treatment Effect

dcis_present.description: check whether or not ductal carcinoma in situ is present
dcis_present.title: Dcis Present

dcis_size.description: if ductal carcinoma in situ is present, identify the size of the largest DCIS in mm, rounded
dcis_size.title: Dcis Size

dcis_comedo_necrosis.description: if ductal carcinoma in situ is present, check whether or not comedo necrosis is present
dcis_comedo_necrosis.title: Dcis Comedo Necrosis

dcis_grade.description: if ductal carcinoma in situ is present, identify the grade of DCIS, low grade (grade 1), intermediate grade (grade 2), high grade (grade 3)
dcis_grade.title: Dcis Grade

nuclear_grade.description: identify the nuclear grade of the tumor
nuclear_grade.title: Nuclear Grade

tubule_formation.description: identify the tubule formation score of the tumor
tubule_formation.title: Tubule Formation

mitotic_rate.description: identify the mitotic rate score of the tumor
mitotic_rate.title: Mitotic Rate

total_score.description: identify the total score of the tumor
total_score.title: Total Score

grade.description: identify the grade of the tumor
grade.title: Grade

tnm_descriptor.description: identify the tnm descriptor of the tumor. e.g., "y" (post-therapy), "r", etc.
tnm_descriptor.title: Tnm Descriptor

pt_category.description: identify the pt category of the tumor
pt_category.title: Pt Category

pn_category.description: identify the pn category of the tumor
pn_category.title: Pn Category

pm_category.description: identify the pm category of the tumor. if you see cM0 or cM1, etc., code as mx, since pathological M category is not available
pm_category.title: Pm Category

pathologic_stage_group.description: identify the pathologic stage group of the tumor, return none if only anatomical stage group is given, dont guess
pathologic_stage_group.title: Pathologic Stage Group

anatomic_stage_group.description: identify the anatomic stage group of the tumor
anatomic_stage_group.title: Anatomic Stage Group

ajcc_version.description: identify the ajcc version of the pathological staging
ajcc_version.title: Ajcc Version

margins.description: return all of the possible involved margins and its distance from cancer. If not present, just output null for every margin
margins.title: Margins

regional_lymph_node.description: return all of the involved regional lymph node. If not present, just output null for every lymph node
regional_lymph_node.title: Regional Lymph Node

extranodal_extension.description: check whether or not extranodal extension is present; if no lymph node metastasis, should be None
extranodal_extension.title: Extranodal Extension

maximal_ln_size.description: check the maximal size of node metastatic tumor in mm, rounded to integer; if no lymph node metastasis, should be None
maximal_ln_size.title: Maximal Ln Size

biomarkers.description: return all of the examined immunoreceptors using immunohistochemistry techniques, like er, pr, her2, ki67, etc. If not present, just output null for every biomarker
biomarkers.title: Biomarkers

margin_category.description: acceptable value for surgical margins in breast cancer. If not included in these standard margins, should be classified as others.
margin_category.title: Margin Category

distance.description: If margin is involved, return 0. If margin is uninvolved/free, try your best to find the distance at both microscopic and macroscopic(gross) description, and specify the distance from tumor to margin in mm, rounded to integer. If the margin is uninvolved/free and, after your best effort, the distance is still not specified, return null
distance.title: Distance

lymph_node_side.description: acceptable value for lymph node side in breast cancer. If not included in these standard sides, should be classified as None.
lymph_node_side.title: Lymph Node Side

lymph_node_category.description: acceptable value for lymph node categories (i.e. stations) in breast cancer. If not included in these standard lymph node 'station' number, should be classified as others.
lymph_node_category.title: Lymph Node Category

station_name.description: specify the name of the lymph node station here.
station_name.title: Station Name

biomarker_category.description: acceptable value for biomarker categories in breast cancer. If not included in these standard categories, should be classified as others.
biomarker_category.title: Biomarker Category

expression.description: specify whether or not the biomarker is expressed here. For Her-2 please refer to the score field, and don't fill in this field.
expression.title: Expression

percentage.description: the percentage of tumor cells showing positive expression of the biomarker, rounded to integer. if not specified, return null
percentage.title: Percentage

score.description: specify the Her-2 expression score, negative: score 0 or 1, equivocal: score 2, positive: score 3 of the biomarker here, if applicable.
score.title: Score

biomarker_name.description: specify the name of the biomarker here.
biomarker_name.title: Biomarker Name
